description: You are logged into wger fitness manager at http://localhost as the admin user (username: admin, password: adminadmin). In the 'Lean Bulk Plan' within the Nutrition section, the 'Morning Power Shake' meal contains duplicate ingredient entries (3x Whey Protein Powder, 2x Peanut Butter, 1x Oat Milk). Remove the duplicate entries so the meal contains exactly one of each ingredient (Whey Protein Powder, Peanut Butter, and Oat Milk) for a total of three items. Do not modify portion amounts.
